source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: A股交易新规下周一正式施行
topics.official_english: New A-Share Trading Rules to Take Effect Next Monday
topics.why_hot: New trading rules directly affect millions of retail investors, sparking widespread discussion on potential market impact.
topics.share_angle: Explain the key changes in the new rules and how they aim to stabilize the market.

topics.chinese_topic: 湖南一地试点：小学入学可直升高中
topics.official_english: Hunan Pilot: Primary School Students Can Directly Enter High School
topics.why_hot: A radical education reform proposal that could reshape the schooling path, drawing intense debate among parents and educators.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the pros and cons of the pilot program and its implications for China's education system.

topics.chinese_topic: 初中生沉迷折纸近十年作品惊艳网友
topics.official_english: Middle School Student's Decade-Long Origami Passion Wows Netizens
topics.why_hot: A heartwarming story of dedication and creativity that resonates with people seeking positive content.
topics.share_angle: Highlight the student's journey and the educational value of nurturing hobbies.

topics.chinese_topic: 电动汽车“最严国标”来了
topics.official_english: China's Strictest National Standards for Electric Vehicles Released
topics.why_hot: New safety and performance standards for EVs affect the entire industry and consumer choices.
topics.share_angle: Break down the key requirements and what they mean for EV manufacturers and buyers.

topics.chinese_topic: 金价创13年来最大季度跌幅
topics.official_english: Gold Prices Post Biggest Quarterly Drop in 13 Years
topics.why_hot: Significant gold price movement impacts investors and signals broader economic trends.
topics.share_angle: Analyze the reasons behind the drop and its implications for global markets.

topics.chinese_topic: 微信转账误转他人 法院判了
topics.official_english: Court Rules on WeChat Transfer Sent to Wrong Person
topics.why_hot: A common digital payment mishap with a legal ruling that provides guidance for similar disputes.
topics.share_angle: Explain the legal principles and practical tips to avoid such errors.

topics.official_english: World Cup: England vs. DR Congo
topics.why_hot: A major World Cup match draws global attention and national pride.
topics.share_angle: Preview the match, key players, and what's at stake for both teams.

topics.chinese_topic: 今年中国首个台风来了
topics.official_english: China's First Typhoon of the Year Arrives
topics.why_hot: Typhoon season begins, affecting millions and prompting disaster preparedness discussions.
topics.share_angle: Report on the typhoon's path, intensity, and safety measures.
